name: notion-agent
description: Zero-overhead Notion API CLI for AI agents — db, page, block, comment, search, user commands. No MCP token overhead.
author: Henry Reith

skills.name: notion-shared
skills.description: Prerequisites: auth, IDs, exit codes, --data flag, output modes

skills.name: notion-db
skills.description: Database commands: schema, query, add, upsert, batch-add, update-schema

skills.name: notion-page
skills.description: Page commands: create, get, set, append, get-markdown, set-markdown, delete, restore, move

skills.name: notion-search
skills.description: Search, block, comment, and user commands

skills.name: notion-knowledge-base
skills.description: Pattern: maintaining a tagged knowledge base with dynamic option creation

skills.name: notion-task-tracker
skills.description: Pattern: task and project tracking database
